name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: What's Next? Protecting our elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

The President continues to deny what American intelligence agencies know to be true -- that Russia interfered in the 2016 election and they will do it again.

It's clearer than ever that we need to do everything we can to protect our elections and make sure they're free and fair. But what can we do?

We can start by passing my bipartisan Secure Elections Act which would strengthen America's election infrastructure to protect against the possibility of future foreign interference.

There is momentum in the Senate to pass this legislation. In fact, we got two new cosponsors just this week.

**This isn 't about what's left or right, this is about protecting our democracy.**

The midterm elections are in just 108 days -- **help us have the strongest campaign we can by sending in a donation today.**

name: Tim Kaine
subject: The first debate of my Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
I take the stage for my first debate of the election in just three hours. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, today I have the first debate of my Senate re-election race.

I've debated a lot in my career - in the courtroom as a civil rights lawyer on behalf of my clients, in meetings with legislators when I was Governor and trying to improve our economy, and advocating for the best policies for voters over and over again in my 2001, 2005, 2012 and 2016 campaigns.

Every time, my focus has been on helping people and making things fairer. This time won't be any different. Now more than ever, we need to stand strong in our commitment to making Virginia and our country work for everyone. Today, I intend to talk about the issues important to Virginians and about the spirit of inclusivity that makes our nation great.

[Will you be there alongside me, Derek? Can you chip in $5 before the debate to show I have you, and Manassas, with me as I take the stage? ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1203/3e0906/696881fc/3e35f6eb/2428954116/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180721_1_FR_TK_Pre-debate-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+be+there+alongside+me+if+recipi&utm_campaign=20180721_1_FR_TK_Pre-debate-LDND&source=20180721_1_FR_TK_Pre-debate-LDND")

In this debate, I'm going to defend our values: that every Virginian should have access to a good job, health care and education, that families belong together, that the Supreme Court should reflect the wishes of the American people, and that women should be free to make their own health care choices.

Today I will stand with veterans, with women, with workers, with everyone in search of a fair shot in Virginia. And I will stand with you, Derek.

name: Greg Stanton
subject: fighting for healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
We know that affordable healthcare is critical to building a strong community. We need to be working towards making it _cheaper and more accessible._

**However, the Trump Administration is working around the clock to do just the opposite while Congress does nothing to hold them accountable.**

If they are successful, millions of vulnerable Americans will be left without healthcare or face soaring expenses.

[**Will you join me in fighting back by adding your name to protect affordable health care?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/SZXoHkHRs5iuh0KnT25U-wGFq-Z1sZqRCGE1uZ7MDa4=/HoBr8-BrbV28hmG6_gyf-kseJV4rt_q8h2-qucjCiGg=)

Thank you!

\-- _Greg_

That means every contribution we receive before this deadline will matter. **[I'm counting on you, and this team. | **Peter,**

**Life is not complicated when it comes to the innocent and the unborn.**

You are either FOR the Constitutional right to LIFE, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness or you are against it. God has His hand on every life, but the responsibility is ours, (through the 10th Amendment) in each of our communities, to protect and to enforce the Founders' intent to protect ALL life under the Constitution.

_The selfish few on the left who want to commit murder under the guise of "abortion" and "choice" will have their Judgement Day;_ their moral compass is theirs to tend. **But we would be as guilty as they if we did not fight everyday to protect the unborn and the innocent and to fight to change the left's "pro-choice" ways.**

Should I become your U.S. Senator, _**I will parse no effort, I will parse no words in fighting and destroying Planned Parenthood and NARAL**_ \-- these organizations are blood-thirsty agents of evil. This is war. They must be stopped. But only if we fight together.

[Help us make that difference.](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=b5b57637dd&e=9da9b0ca31)

name: Team Sisolak
subject: POLL: Protect the ACA?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/USVPoz2YEJbLyJj1UnE9GPfTC9VogENMoQO0qIPK3HI=/P62eMU6YaPMIvGc1uEWCkv2l2uWm7jtX0Ea1k3GGz1g=)
---
Friend,

Health care is a right that needs to be protected. That's why Steve Sisolak believes that all Nevadans -- especially the **one in four** working-age adults in Nevada who have a pre-existing condition -- deserve access to affordable, quality care.

Adam Laxalt apparently disagrees. He called the Affordable Care Act **" the most flawed piece of major legislation America has ever endured."** And now, he's silent as Donald Trump attacks the ACA -- and the more than 400,000 Nevadans with pre-existing conditions who face the risk of losing their coverage. It's not right.

**[Do you agree with Steve Sisolak that we need to defend the Affordable Care Act and protections for pre-existing conditions?](https://act.myngp.com/el/USVPoz2YEJbLyJj1UnE9GPfTC9VogENMoQO0qIPK3HI=/w10_-2SEbr88_91PQpdSipBBl83GCLOgoA-_MiKacLY=?gpsid=37_57_2197&ms=em18_180720_health_engg_gq_act_aca_ts_ettx&refcode=em18_180720_health_engg_gq_act_aca_ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180720_health_engg_gq_act_aca_ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**
[YES](https://act.myngp.com/el/USVPoz2YEJbLyJj1UnE9GPfTC9VogENMoQO0qIPK3HI=/w10_-2SEbr88_91PQpdSipBBl83GCLOgoA-_MiKacLY=?gpsid=37_57_2197&ms=em18_180720_health_engg_gq_act_aca_ts_ettx&refcode=em18_180720_health_engg_gq_act_aca_ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180720_health_engg_gq_act_aca_ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso) | [NO](https://act.myngp.com/Forms/6692830908240563200?gpsid=37_57_2197&ms=em18_180720_health_engg_gq_act_aca_ts_ettx&refcode=em18_180720_health_engg_gq_act_aca_ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180720_health_engg_gq_act_aca_ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
---|---
As governor, Steve will fight back against any effort to roll back Nevadans' access to health care because he knows health care is a right, not a privilege. Laxalt will only follow the lead of Trump and his Republican allies.

**[We need to know where you stand: Do you think Nevada's next governor should protect people with pre-existing conditions? name: Jay Inslee
subject: Trump's Weakness. Our Patriotism.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
If the president won't stand up to Russia, we must.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78a34/2f5ea88d/774c9c58/2cbc0a1f/3701353359/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/rga-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-07-21_rga-petition-resend&refcode=ema_2018-07-21_rga-petition-resend&utm_campaign=rga-petition-resend&utm_medium=ema") Friend, During our most challenging moments, Americans so often show our very best instincts. We band together. We unite against hate. We take action because we know there are some values far bigger than any individual or any political party. And yet here we are at one of those moments. Our country was attacked. Our democracy was threatened. Yet this president has put himself ahead of his own country. The only question now is if his fellow Republicans have the courage to act on behalf of the people they've sworn to serve. When the president of the United States stands feet from a hostile regime, we expect leadership, we expect patriotism, and we expect courage. But instead, Trump shook Vladimir Putin's hand -- with a smile and a wink -- then bent to the will of a dictator. President Trump proved his cowardice. He showed how weak he truly is. And yes, his actions in Helsinki were inexcusable. Then yesterday Trump asked us to believe his denial of the attacks on our democracy were a misspeak! I don't know about you, but this is one lie too many for me. Now our only question is: How will we collectively respond as a country -- Republicans and Democrats alike? Today, right here and right now, Republicans across the country must do more than tweet their condemnation -- they must put country ahead of party. It's time to act. And that's why, as Chair of the Democratic Governors Association, I call on the Republican Governors Association to join us in refusing to use hacked data in our campaigns. Our democracy is too important to simply give in to Russian interference. We know we can't depend on Donald Trump to stand up to Russia. But I hope his fellow Republicans will. [**Add your name now -- because if Trump won't stand up to Russia, the rest of us must act. Tell Republicans to refuse to use any hacked data in their campaigns.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78a34/2f5ea88d/774c9c58/2cbc0a1f/3701353359/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/rga-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-07-21_rga-petition-resend&refcode=ema_2018-07-21_rga-petition-resend&utm_campaign=rga-petition-resend&utm_medium=ema") It's just one small way to show our strength as the president shows his weakness. It's just one way to show we'll lead with integrity while the president fills the airways with lies. And it's one small act of unity -- in a time where it's so difficult to find common ground. But it's through action and unity that we'll take our country back -- one step, no matter how small, at a time. Thanks for your patriotism. It matters now more than ever. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78a34/2f5ea88d/774c9c58/2cbc0a1f/3701353359/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/rga-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-07-21_rga-petition-resend&refcode=ema_2018-07-21_rga-petition-resend&utm_campaign=rga-petition-resend&utm_medium=ema")

| | Some days feel nonstop. The poll numbers are drawing closer and closer. The days to the election are becoming less and less. It is easy for nerves to run high. But I have never felt more confident in our team. I wanted to take a moment to thank and introduce you to our 2018 summer campaign fellows. These are students and young people from across the district knocking doors, making phone calls, and organizing events for the campaign over their summer breaks: | [](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542780a/e3b7d3/5c7b072d/2555f051/89502938/VEsH/ "https://manning.bsd.net/e180721b")
---
While our country and our values are being tested in unimaginable ways -- these young people have stepped up. They are energized, engaged, and keep me going when days are tough.
[](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542780a/e3b7d3/5c7b072d/2555f051/89502938/VEsE/ "https://manning.bsd.net/e180721b")
---
I want to say a huge thank you to all our fellows, our volunteers, our supporters and every single one you who's a part of this grassroots team. It's people like you who have made this campaign a success.
[**We want you to be a part of this team. Please sign up today to volunteer if you can and help us make the difference.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542780a/e3b7d3/5c7b072d/2555f051/89502938/VEsF/ "https://manning.bsd.net/e180721b")
Thank you,
Kathy
